title: Product Marketer - London
key_evidence: Asks 2-4 yrs marketing (Ryan ~4.4yr marketing/community); Ryan well inside band
Explicitly: 'You don't necessarily have to have formal/traditional marketing experience... taste and storytelling are essential' - lowers the no-degree/non-traditional barrier

Role prizes AI-native operator: 'builds automated content engines, uses Claude to write in multiple brand voices, leverages Cursor to ship landing pages' - direct map to Ryan's Claude Code agent building
Wants 'extremely high-agency creative generalist... come up with an idea and execute within days' - matches first-employee/FA spike
Content engine ownership (blog/email/social) = Ryan's Minima content engine (30k blog/40k X/5k YT)
Small team, '$20M Series A led by 645 Ventures, a16z'; 'work directly with our founder' = founder/HM read, not big recruiter funnel
Posted 2026-04-29 (~6 weeks old at run) - somewhat aged, may be filling but still listed
Domain is B2B fintech/billing (CFOs/Finance leaders) - NOT Ryan's crypto/community domain; some ramp needed
Salary GBP70-85k + equity - well above Ryan's 50k floor
biggest_lever: Reframe Minima as an AI-native content/growth engine built from zero ($4.5m presale, content engine) and lead with concrete Claude/Cursor automation artifacts - the listing literally describes Ryan's self-taught spike as the ideal profile.
biggest_risk: Domain mismatch: target audience is Finance/CFO B2B SaaS buyers, not crypto/community. B2B demand-gen-for-finance fluency is a learnable gap but a real one; competition from polished B2B SaaS marketers who already 'speak CFO'.
